# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User File Upload
Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents
Version: 1.0
*/

// Prevent direct access
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class UserFileUpload {
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('init', array($this, 'init'));
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_scripts'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_upload_user_file', array($this, 'handle_file_upload'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_upload_user_file', array($this, 'handle_file_upload'));
    }
    
    public function init() {
        // Create upload directory
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $user_files_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files';
        
        if (!file_exists($user_files_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_files_dir);
        }
    }
    
    public function enqueue_scripts() {
        wp_enqueue_script('jquery');
        wp_enqueue_script('user-file-upload', plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'js/upload.js', array('jquery'), '1.0', true);
        wp_localize_script('user-file-upload', 'ajax_object', array('ajax_url' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php')));
    }
    
    public function handle_file_upload() {
        // Check nonce
        if (!wp_verify_nonce($_POST['nonce'], 'user_file_upload_nonce')) {
            wp_die('Security check failed');
        }
        
        // Check if user is logged in
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_die('You must be logged in to upload files');
        }
        
        // Check if file was uploaded
        if (!isset($_FILES['user_file']) || $_FILES['user_file']['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            wp_die('File upload error');
        }
        
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $target_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files/';
        $file_name = sanitize_file_name($_FILES['user_file']['name']);
        $target_file = $target_dir . $user_id . '_' . $file_name;
        
        // Allow only specific file types
        $allowed_types = array(
            'image/jpeg',
            'image/jpg',
            'image/png',
            'image/gif',
            'application/pdf',
            'application/msword',
            'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'text/plain'
        );
        
        $file_type = mime_content_type($_FILES['user_file']['tmp_name']);
        
        if (!in_array($file_type, $allowed_types)) {
            wp_die('File type not allowed');
        }
        
        // Move uploaded file
        if (move_uploaded_file($_FILES['user_file']['tmp_name'], $target_file)) {
            // Save file info to user meta
            $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, 'user_uploaded_files', true);
            if (!$user_files) {
                $user_files = array();
            }
            
            $file_info = array(
                'file_path' => $target_file,
                'file_url' => $upload_dir['baseurl'] . '/user-files/' . $user_id . '_' . $file_name,
                'file_name' => $file_name,
                'upload_date' => current_time('mysql')
            );
            
            $user_files[] = $file_info;
            update_user_meta($user_id, 'user_uploaded_files', $user_files);
            
            echo json_encode(array('success' => true, 'message' => 'File uploaded successfully'));
        } else {
            wp_die('Failed to move uploaded file');
        }
        
        wp_die();
    }
}

new UserFileUpload();

// Add shortcode for file upload form
function user_file_upload_form() {
    if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
        return 'Please log in to upload files.';
    }
    
    $nonce = wp_create_nonce('user_file_upload_nonce');
    
    ob_start();
    ?>
    <form id="user-file-upload-form" enctype="multipart/form-data">
        <input type="file" name="user_file" id="user_file" required>
        <input type="hidden" name="nonce" value="<?php echo $nonce; ?>">
        <input type="hidden" name="action" value="upload_user_file">
        <button type="submit">Upload File</button>
    </form>
    <div id="upload-status"></div>
    <?php
    return ob_get_clean();
}
add_shortcode('user_file_upload', 'user_file_upload_form');
?>
